title: production manager
description:
DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

1.     Collaborate with senior managers/supervisors in the development of performance goals and long-term operational plans

2.     Maximize efficiency and productivity through extensive process analysis and interdepartmental collaboration

3.     Maintain individual project budget and profitability

4.     Analyse current operational processes and performance, recommending solutions for improvement, where necessary

5.     Develop, implement, and monitor day-to-day operational (limited to direct report departments) and projects processes to provide visibility into the goals, progress, and obstacles of key initiatives

6.     Plan, monitor, and analyse key metrics for day-to-day operations to ensure efficient and timely completion of tasks

7.     Plan all construction operations and schedule intermediate phases to ensure deadlines will be met

8.     Implementation of process improvements to maximize output and minimize costs

9.     Manage project team, all site staff, site works, materials and equipment effectively and efficiently

10. Investigate unsatisfactory productivity / performance and initiate measures to improve

11. Establish good communication and working relationships with client, consultants, contractors, suppliers and staff

12. Prepare regular progress reports for each project

13. Manage material quantities and minimize wastage, no overstock of materials in warehouse and at construction site

14. Manage manpower and overtime cost to ensure optimal cost benefit within or below budget

15. Attend and/or chair meetings with clients, architects, engineers and workers as and when required

16. Ensure all changes to specifications, work scopes and drawings are properly documented

17. May be required to travel overseas for project requirements, conduct overseas inspections, and management of overseas business operations.

18. Any other ad-hoc projects and duties as required by the management

postedCompany.description: Polybuilding (S) Pte Ltd has been in the building industry since 1974.  We specialise in the supply and installation for all kinds of natural stones including marbles, granites, limestones, travertines.  We also import and keep stock of a wide variety of compressed stones and ceramic tles to cater to development of all scales.  We have an experienced team to provide customers with feedback o the latest aesthetics, practicalit and technical recommendation to suit all industry's demands.  We have full production facilities including machineries for profiling into various finishes and cutting into various sizes to meet customers' requirements.
postedCompany.name: POLYBUILDING (S) PTE LTD
